title: Pure Input
overview: Cocona is having an average day until a girl with a hover board takes her into another dimension. With nothing but their wits, their adventure begins.

title: Pure Converter
overview: Cocona refuses to meet with Papika, and she's afraid to let her true feelings show about their last adventure. Papika isn’t about to give up that easily!

title: Pure XLR
overview: Stranded on a deserted planet, Papika is trying to find Cocona. Meanwhile, Cocona must fight her way out of a terrifying illusion.

title: Pure Equalization
overview: Cocona and Papika must learn to harmonize their feelings. As a result, Cocona ends up staying over at Papika’s "place" but, as always, nothing goes as expected.

title: Pure Echo
overview: Papika and Cocona land in a world that looks a lot like school, but with a few unsettling differences...

title: Pure Play
overview: The girls find themselves fighting against Yayaka and her group. Meanwhile, a portal opens and they end up being sucked in.

title: Pure Component
overview: The girls realize that their adventures in Pure Illusion are starting to bleed over into the real world. Cocona starts to feel unsure about their travels.

title: Pure Breaker
overview: Cocona and Papika get thrown into Pure Illusion, entering a futuristic city. The girls and Yayaka must work together if they want to get out alive.

title: Pure Mute
overview: Yayaka's usefulness comes into question, and as Cocona and Yayaka face off, their friendship and lives are put on the line.

title: Pure Jitter
overview: Cocona demands answers as Asclepius attacks Flip Flap. Cocona's world starts to crumble as the truth is finally revealed.

title: Pure Storage
overview: Mimi poses a threat to the world. Salt and Papika try to stop her only to be overwhelmed by their memories.

title: Pure Howling
overview: Yayaka and Papika have teamed up to save Cocona from her mother. As they follow Mimi and Cocona, they must fight their way through Pure Illusion.

title: Pure Audio
overview: Cocona and Papika reunited forever more bring Mimi and Pure Illusion's rampage on reality to an end.
